'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 89''' was the eighty-ninth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[September 10]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda's]] Verdict
*[[Gragra/Legends|Gragra]] the [[Gorgmonger/Legends|Gorgmonger]]
*[[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]
*[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]
*[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Firmus Piett/Legends|Firmus Piett]]
*[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] - [[Theed/Legends|Theed]] [[Theed Funeral Temple/Legends|Funeral Temple]]
*[[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]]
*[[Gyrowheel 1.42.08-series recycling droid|Gyrowheel 1.42.08 Recycling Droid]]
*[[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]] [[DF.9/Legends|DF.9]] anti-infantry battery
*[[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught'']]
